name: Button
sketchPattern: Rounded rectangle with centered text, possibly filled or outlined

name: Input
sketchPattern: Rectangle with a horizontal line or border, possibly with placeholder text inside

name: Card
sketchPattern: Large rectangle with distinct header area (title text at top) and content area below

name: Label
sketchPattern: Small text near an input or form element

name: Checkbox
sketchPattern: Small square, possibly with a checkmark inside

name: RadioGroup
sketchPattern: Small circles in a vertical list, one possibly filled

name: Switch
sketchPattern: Pill or capsule shape with a circle toggle inside

name: Select
sketchPattern: Rectangle with a down-pointing arrow or chevron on the right side

name: Textarea
sketchPattern: Large rectangle taller than a standard input, for multiline text

name: Tabs
sketchPattern: Horizontal row of text items with one underlined or highlighted, content area below

name: Dialog
sketchPattern: Rectangle centered on screen with a darker/shaded overlay behind it, resembling a popup or modal

name: NavigationMenu
sketchPattern: Horizontal bar at the top of the page with multiple text items or links

name: Table
sketchPattern: Grid of rows and columns with visible borders or lines separating cells

name: Badge
sketchPattern: Small rounded pill shape with short text inside, often near other elements

name: Alert
sketchPattern: Rectangular box with an icon on the left and text content, often with a colored border

name: Avatar
sketchPattern: Small circle, possibly with initials or an image placeholder inside

name: Separator
sketchPattern: Horizontal or vertical line dividing sections of content

name: Slider
sketchPattern: Horizontal line with a circle handle/knob that can slide left and right

name: Sheet
sketchPattern: Panel sliding in from the side or bottom of the screen

name: Accordion
sketchPattern: Stacked rows where each row has a title and an expand/collapse arrow, content hidden below
